allow: Bash(curl -s "https://www.melon.com/song/detail.htm?songId=37770734" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" -H "Referer: https://www.melon.com")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in d.get\('format',{}\).get\('tags',{}\).items\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(s['codec_type'], s.get\('codec_name'\), 'attached_pic:', s.get\('disposition',{}\).get\('attached_pic'\)\) for s in d['streams']]")
Bash(ffmpeg -y -i test.mp3 -i thumb.jpg -map 0:a -map 1:v -c:a copy -c:v mjpeg -disposition:v attached_pic -id3v2_version 3 -f mp3 test3.mp3)
